channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 360cab3d-4340-4c96-816d-682fbd52b3e2
Display name: Inference Account Operator
Description: Create, read, modify, and delete inference accounts. This role should be assigned to users who can only manage inference accounts but can't perform inference operations.
Link: https://management.azure.com/360cab3d-4340-4c96-816d-682fbd52b3e2?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 3e9f3756-203e-4734-a0b8-4b68691ffae3
Display name: Anyscale Platform Administrator Role
Description: Provides full access to Anyscale Cloud and resources as well as admin features such as usage and resource notifications.
Link: https://management.azure.com/3e9f3756-203e-4734-a0b8-4b68691ffae3?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 469a0cf0-3794-4627-838e-39d04f27b306
Display name: Procurement Contributor with Resource Group Permissions
Description: Manage procurement of products and services, and create, update, and delete resource groups.
Link: https://management.azure.com/469a0cf0-3794-4627-838e-39d04f27b306?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 6c74a7c5-4a87-40f9-bb03-61e49aecbc78
Display name: Semantic Reranker User
Description: Execute semantic reranking operations against registered inference accounts. This role should be assigned to users who need to run semantic reranking workloads but do not need to manage the accounts themselves.
Link: https://management.azure.com/6c74a7c5-4a87-40f9-bb03-61e49aecbc78?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 6d461258-d39c-46cc-8ca1-cab4120979d8
Display name: Anyscale Platform Contributor Role
Description: Grants read/write access to Anyscale Cloud and resources
Link: https://management.azure.com/6d461258-d39c-46cc-8ca1-cab4120979d8?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 76315a85-9e6b-4514-9780-868b1977b64e
Display name: Inference Account Owner
Description: Create, read, modify, and delete inference accounts; as well as running inference workloads against those accounts. This role should be assigned to users who need full management capabilities over inference accounts, including the ability to run workloads.
Link: https://management.azure.com/76315a85-9e6b-4514-9780-868b1977b64e?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: ab24b16e-fd5d-41b5-839e-6c6d2ad32363
Display name: Anyscale Platform Reader Role
Description: Read access to Anyscale Cloud and resources
Link: https://management.azure.com/ab24b16e-fd5d-41b5-839e-6c6d2ad32363?api-version=2022-04-01
